overview: A premium wristwatch brand website featuring an elegant product catalog, shopping cart, and luxury brand storytelling. Showcases curated watch collections with elegant placeholder names, pricing, and a refined luxury aesthetic.
features: Product catalog with elegant watch collections and pricing
Shopping cart with add, remove, and quantity management
Product detail pages with full descriptions
Hero section with luxury brand storytelling
About section with brand heritage narrative
Premium OKLCH-based luxury color palette with dark/light themes
Fully responsive luxury design with refined typography
